title: Looking to hire a Monday.com specialist to get Architecture and Urban Design Firm up and running on Monday
excerpt: We are looking to hire a Monday.com specialist who can help our small architecture firm set up Monday.com to meet the needs of our team and optimize our project flow.

posts.author: rhejduk (Renata Hejduk)
posts.cookedHtml: We are looking to hire a Monday.com specialist who can help our small architecture firm set up Monday.com to meet the needs of our team and optimize our project flow.

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Renata! I’d love to chat with you about your project. I’ll send you a private message where you can book a time for us to get together and walk through your goals for using Monday.
~ Deb Cinkus

posts.author: MonDude (MonDude)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Renata, I’d also be interested in speaking with you about your project. Please feel free to message, and I’ll work to get you a message as well. Thanks!

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Renata!
You are in luck. As Certified Preferred Partners of monday.com we will most likely be able to help you out and we have solved similar needs in monday.com before.
We are locate in Sweden but work with monday.com clients all over the world.

Before I can commit I do however need a quick chat with you to understand your needs better and what your workflows looks like. From that chat I will be able to give you a recommendation on the course of action and a quote.
Please use this link to book an initial scoping meeting: https://cal.mixmax.com/thomaskarlsson-305/video-45

Hope to hear from you soon!

posts.author: rhejduk (Renata Hejduk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Thomas, Thanks for your note. Please email my husband architect Darren Petrucci who is the principal and owner of our Architecture firm. His email is dpetrucci@a-i-rinc.com or text him at 480-329-1888 (we are in Massachusetts until end of September). Basically, he has a firm of 5 architects who need to streamline project delivery. They don’t have time to set up Monday.com and need help with the initial set up and understanding of how it might work for a small architecture firm.
Thanks so much.
Best,
Renata Hejduk
